services.name: scheduler-worker
services.purpose: Temporal worker for scheduled graph execution and ingestion
services.reason: Temporal worker with explicit /livez and /readyz contract.
services.probe_plan: Already implemented via HTTP /livez and /readyz in Deployment probes.
services.k3s_path: Apply existing Argo app + staging/production overlays and promote by digest.

services.name: sandbox-openclaw
services.purpose: Long-running OpenClaw gateway for sandboxed agent execution
services.reason: Long-lived network service with Deployment + Service + probes now defined under infra/cd/base/sandbox-openclaw.
services.probe_plan: Implemented with startupProbe/livenessProbe/readinessProbe using tcpSocket on port 18789.
services.k3s_path: Managed via Argo Application infra/cd/argocd/applications/sandbox-openclaw.yaml and staging/production overlays.

services.name: sandbox-runtime
services.reason: Not a long-running service; executed as short-lived runtime containers.
services.probe_plan: No Deployment probes; model as Job/Pod template health via completion and timeout policies.
services.k3s_path: Define a Job template/controller contract (TTLSecondsAfterFinished, activeDeadlineSeconds, network policy), then manage template via Argo.
